description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use two jobs: one for linting and one for testing. The linting job runs on ubuntu-20.04, sets up Python 3.8, installs bandit, codespell, and flake8, and then runs these tools. The testing job uses a matrix strategy to test on ROS 2 distributions foxy and galactic on ubuntu-20.04, checking out the code, setting up ROS, and running the ROS CI action.
